heading: Listens without judgement
quote: Becca is such an easy person to talk to. She listens without judgement and has this lovely way of helping you make sense of things when life feels a bit tangled. She's thoughtful, caring, and genuinely wants to see people do well and be happy. You always feel supported and understood after speaking with her.
name: Sarah

heading: Creating your new chapter
quote: Life Doula Becca understands that life can throw a curve ball with that wrong turn defining you. Through her own personal experience, she has created a space for people to grow, to accept, and to change that perceived wrong turn into a beautiful expression of who you are now, creating that reality of a new chapter. Becca has a tireless commitment to growth through empathy and understanding, this has become her life's mission, to help others achieve their peace.
name: Charlotte

heading: I'll always be grateful for her support
quote: I came to Rebecca when I felt completely lost and unsure of my direction. She listened with such care and spoke the right words at the right time. Her calm presence and genuine warmth made it easy to open up, and I never felt rushed or judged. Thanks to her guidance, I've found the clarity and confidence to move forward, and I'll always be grateful for her support.
name: Dushan
